articles.title: HTET admit card 2026 released at htet.eapplynow.com: Direct link to download hall tickets here
articles.summary: The Board of School Education, Haryana has released the HTET 2026 admit cards for candidates appearing in the July 4–5 teacher eligibility examination. Registered applicants can now access their hall tickets online using their login credentials.

articles.title: TNEA rank list 2026 expected to be released today at tneaonline.org: Check complete details here
articles.summary: The TNEA Rank List 2026 is scheduled to be released on July 1 after being postponed from June 29 to incorporate revised CBSE re-evaluation marks. Prepared on a standardized 200-mark scale, the merit list will determine candidates' eligibility and ranking for engineering counselling and seat allotment across Tamil Nadu.

articles.title: CBSE Class 10 second board exam results soon: What is the best marks rule students must know?
articles.summary: CBSE's Better Marks Rule, introduced under the new two-board examination system for Class 10 from the 2026 academic session, allows students to retain the higher score from two board exam attempts. Applied separately to each subject, the rule offers a chance to improve marks or clear failed papers while reducing exam pressure and eliminating the risk of losing existing scores..

articles.title: CBSE Class 12 supplementary exam 2026 announced; Schools asked to submit LOC by July 8
articles.summary: CBSE has begun the registration process for the Class 12 Supplementary Examination 2026, directing affiliated schools to submit the List of Candidates (LOC) through the Pariksha Sangam portal between June 30 and July 8. Eligible compartment and improvement candidates can apply, while students omitted from the LOC will not be permitted to appear for the examination..
